questions.statement:
<p>Choose the option that is a synonym for the given word:</p>

<p>INDOLENCE</p>
<strong>Select the word with the incorrect spelling.</strong>

<p><strong>Directions: Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word.</strong></p>

<p>HORRENDOUS</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word.</p>

<p>Ostentatious</p>

<p>Select the word that is closest in meaning (SYNONYM) to the word given below.</p>

<p>VAULT&nbsp;</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate meaning of the underlined idiom in the given sentence.</p>

<p>Stop <u>flogging a dead horse</u> and concentrate on your career.</p>
options: <span style="">To waste time on useless things&nbsp;</span> /

questions.statement:
<p><strong>Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words.</strong></p>

<p>An examination of a dead body to determine the cause of death</p>

<p>Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words.</p>

<p>A soldier who fights for the sake of money</p>
